description: Promote --non-interactive to a global CLI flag, add -s/-n short flags to list and tag commands, and accept TREB_NON_INTERACTIVE=1 in addition to true

userStories.title: Add Global --non-interactive Flag to Cli Struct
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want --non-interactive to be a global flag accepted by every command so that I can skip interactive prompts regardless of which subcommand I invoke.
acceptanceCriteria: `treb --non-interactive run script/Deploy.s.sol` is accepted by the parser
`treb run --non-interactive script/Deploy.s.sol` is accepted (clap global flags work in both positions)
`treb --non-interactive list` is accepted (previously would fail)
The `Run` and `Compose` variants no longer define their own `non_interactive` field
Typecheck passes (`cargo check -p treb-cli` — may require US-002 to fully compile)

userStories.title: Wire Global Non-Interactive Flag Through All Command Handlers
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want every command that checks for non-interactive mode to receive the global --non-interactive flag value so that prompts are consistently skipped when the flag is set.
acceptanceCriteria: `cargo check -p treb-cli` passes
`cargo test -p treb-cli` passes
All command handlers that call `is_non_interactive()` receive the global flag value instead of hardcoded `false`
No command handler calls `is_non_interactive(false)` anymore
`treb --non-interactive prune` skips confirmation prompt
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Accept TREB_NON_INTERACTIVE=1 in Addition to true
userStories.description: As a CI pipeline author, I want TREB_NON_INTERACTIVE=1 to trigger non-interactive mode so that the env var convention matches common CI usage and the documented convention.
acceptanceCriteria: `TREB_NON_INTERACTIVE=1` triggers non-interactive mode
`TREB_NON_INTERACTIVE=true` still triggers non-interactive mode (backward compat)
`TREB_NON_INTERACTIVE=TRUE` still triggers non-interactive mode (case-insensitive)
`TREB_NON_INTERACTIVE=0` does NOT trigger non-interactive mode
`TREB_NON_INTERACTIVE=false` does NOT trigger non-interactive mode
Unit tests in `interactive.rs` updated to cover the `1` value
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add -s and -n Short Flags to list and tag Commands
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want -s for --namespace and -n for --network on list and tag commands so that I have the same shorthand flags available as in the Go CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: `treb list -n mainnet` works (equivalent to `treb list --network mainnet`)
`treb list -s production` works (equivalent to `treb list --namespace production`)
`treb ls -n mainnet -s production` works (with alias)
`treb tag Counter -n mainnet` is accepted by parser (no unknown flag error)
`treb tag Counter -s production` is accepted by parser
`treb list --help` shows `-n` next to `--network` and `-s` next to `--namespace`
No short flag conflicts with other commands
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Tag command network/namespace fields are accepted by the parser but may be unused until Phase 6 wires filtering logic.

userStories.title: Update Golden Tests and Add Integration Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden tests and integration tests updated to reflect the new global --non-interactive flag and short flags so that CI catches regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: All golden help files updated to reflect new global `--non-interactive` and short flags
`cargo test -p treb-cli` passes with all golden tests
`cargo test --workspace --all-targets` passes
`cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets` passes
New integration test: `--non-interactive` accepted on `list` command
New integration test: `TREB_NON_INTERACTIVE=1` triggers non-interactive mode
New compatibility test: `-n`/`-s` short flags produce same output as long forms on `list`
